journalEntry.title: New journal entry
journalEntry.journalTooltip: SYSCOHADA journal code (AC, VE, BQ, CA, OD, AN, CL). Determines the nature of the transaction and its accounting framework.
journalEntry.accountTooltip: Account number from the OHADA chart of accounts (e.g. 411 for Customers). A line may carry either a debit OR a credit, never both. Total debits must equal total credits.
journalEntry.otherOperationHint: Free entry for miscellaneous transactions. Make sure debits and credits balance.
journalEntry.dragDropFiles: Drag and drop your files here
journalEntry.fileFormatsHint: PDF, images, Excel, Word - Max 10 MB per file
journalEntry.mandatoryNotesPurchasePlaceholder: Mandatory notes on the purchase invoice...
journalEntry.mandatoryNotesSalePlaceholder: Mandatory notes on the sales invoice...
journalEntry.fixBeforeValidating: Please fix these items before validating the journal entry.
journalEntry.entryReadyToValidate: Journal entry ready to be validated
journalEntry.allChecksPassed: All checks passed successfully. You can validate and post this journal entry.
journalEntry.validateAndPostTooltip: Validate and post this journal entry

balance.subtitle: Summary view of accounts
balance.columns4Desc: Account no. • Description • Total Debit • Total Credit
balance.columns5Desc: Account no. • Description • Total Debit • Total Credit • Balance (with D/C indicator)
balance.columns6Desc: Account no. • Description • Total Debit • Total Credit • Debit Balance • Credit Balance
balance.label: Label
balance.noCustomerAccounts: No customer account with activity in the period.
balance.noSupplierAccounts: No supplier account with activity in the period.
balance.noAuxAccounts: No subsidiary account with activity in the period.
balance.noReceivables: No customer receivable in the period.

lettrage.footerHintStart: Tick a line: matching amounts are highlighted in
